summary: Validate Data Integrity After HL7/FHIR Transformation
description: Test that data imported from external sources and transformed using HL7/FHIR protocols remains intact and accurate.
objective: Verify that data integrity is maintained throughout the import/export and transformation process.
prerequisites: HL7/FHIR protocol configuration is set up correctly
Test data is available for import
test_steps: Import test data using HL7/FHIR protocol
Verify that data is transformed correctly and no errors occur during transformation
Check that original data remains intact after transformation
expected_result: Data integrity is maintained throughout the process, with no discrepancies or errors.
acceptance_criteria: No data discrepancies or errors occur during transformation
Original data remains intact after transformation
